Electronic: Deals with electronic devices — robots, computers, microwave ovens, solid state Ts, and so on. 
Mechar 'eals with purely mechanical systems — elevators, coffee pots, bicycles, etc: 
Nuclear: Deals with fission and fusion plants, huclear earth-moving devices, Orion-style space drives, and other neat things. 
WH Computer skills Data Analysis: This skill permits a character to submit a problem to The Computer along with all the relevant data. The Computer fnalyzes the problem in terms ofthe character's statement ofthe problem, the data it has been given by the character, and the data that it has which may not be available to the character, The Computer then delivers an analysis, breaking down possibilities by per cent chance of likelihood. Examples: “Computes, given the serial number ‘ofthis weapon round and the odd ticking noise issuing from it, what is our best course of ac- tion?” or “Given the charred condition of the bot, evaluate these courses of action: A. deac: tivate and abandon bot; B, scrub bot’ sensors and continue mission; C, dismantle bot and run full diagnostic program with resultant delay in mission.” Using this sill depends primarily on clever and logical player problem solving, paricular- Iy in choosing and framing the right questions. ‘A successful skill roll means accurate and Useful information, An unsuccessful one reas useless or misleading information, For example: The Question: Friend Computer! Data analysis, please, What happened to Mission Group 16, and why did they not return to Alpha Complext ‘The Skill Rol: Fail. ‘The Computer's Response: Break down of probabilities: * Probability One — (Classified): 65% Probability Two — (Classified): 23% Probability Three — They met with over whelming opposition from traitors: 10% * Probability Four — They are lost: 2% ‘The Computers Thinking: Here’ whats real ly going on in the mind of The Computer. There is a 65% chance that the Trouble shooters have killed each other in a typical Paranoia snafu and bloodbath, There is a 23% chance that the area in question is inhabited by traitors, and. that some or all of the ‘Troubleshooters have joined the traitors. The ‘Computer suppresses these unpleasant details to avoid frightening the character (and to avoid siving him unhealthy ideas) Fear and ignorance, Data Search: This skill is used to retrieve in- formation from databases, find poorly catalogued information, evade security Clearance restrictions on information, etc ‘Make a skill roll when a character tequests information directly through Computer ter mminals or data links. A failed roll means The Computer becomes suspicious and the characters awarded a treason point Computer Programming: Warning! Warning! This skill is classified Ultraviolet! ‘Communist Propaganda 
Warning! Warning! Knowledge or use ofthis skill is treason! Knowledge that this skill ex- ist is treason! Possession by any citizen of any clearance whatsoever is treason! Unlike all other skills, Communist propa- ganda is not governed by an attribute. All ‘characters begin with a Communist propagan- da skill level of 0. The Communist propaganda skill is so treasonous that it is not printed on the character sheet. When a character learns it, he should note this and his skill evel on the back (private) side of his sheet. ‘A character. may learn it from other ccharacters with the skill — whether or not he 
61 
‘wants to learn it, Here's how it works: The victim must listen to or read the propa- anda expounded by the skilled propagandist. This must continue for atleast five rounds. The vietim may listen voluntarily, or may be restrained and forced to listen, or may be made cooperative with drugs, or may be conned, fast talked, oF intimidated into listening, At the end of five rounds, the propagandist makes a skill roll. ifthe rol is successful, the victim learns the Communist propaganda skill at level 1 Successive uses of the skill can increase the victims skill evel, but his level can never be increased to a higher number than that possessed by the propagandist... Only the victim knows whether the propa- ganda attempt was successful, The ‘gamemaster will ell him by note or in a private conference, . The victim need not ever use the skill if he doesn't want to fhe is loyal to The Computer, hhe may refuse ever to think about Communist propaganda again, or perhaps he will feel compelled to report himselt sgandist) to The Computer fort However, if interrogated, he may be forced to reveal that he knows Communist propaganda — treason sufficient to warrant im mediate execution. The possibilities for extor- ton are lft as an exerci forthe ieested student, Note that an unsuccessful attempt to use this skill means the victim receives incontrovert: ble evidence of the propagandist’s treason, This makes using Communist proganda ex tuemely dangerous, but being a Commie in ‘Alpha Complex is a risky business 
‘Treasonous Skills 
Bribery and Forgery: Any character may know these skills and spend skill points to in- crease his skill value with them. However, use ing them is always treason. Old Reckoning Cultures: This. skill. is classified Blue. All characters have it at their moxie skill base level, since everyone has heard rumors about the Old Reckoninj However, characters may not spend skill points to increase their skill level unless they are of Blue clearance or higher, or belong toa secret society (48 or 50) that teaches the skill to its members, Displaying any knowledge of Old Reckoning cultures ata security clearance of Green or below is reason, and punishable by summary execution. Computer Programming and. Security: These skills are classified Ultraviolet. They follow the same rules as Old Reckoning ccultures, except that only characters. of Ultraviolet clearance and members of certain secret societies (see page 43) may spend skill points on them, Knowledge or use by any citizen of security clearance Violet or below is treason Communist Propaganda: This skill is so ‘treasonous it srt even printed on the character sheets. Knowledge or possession ofthis skill, bya citizen of any security clearance right up to Ultraviolet, inclusive, is treason,
